_doc: H-2 Bloat Gate config. bin/bloat-gate reads this; CLI flags override these; these override built-in defaults. mode: strict|standard|off. In strict every hard axis (dead code, duplication, complexity) AND the LOC ratio block the wave. In standard (default) dead/dup/complexity are hard; LOC ratio + dependency creep are advisory (reported + flagged, not fatal). In off all metrics are still computed and reported but status is always pass (observability-only — use during adoption ramp-in). dependency_creep NEVER auto-fails in any mode: a changed lockfile is FLAGGED for plan-time approval. An axis whose tool is absent is reported status:skipped and is NOT treated as a pass.

thresholds._doc: max_new_dead_exports: count of NEW unreferenced exports/symbols allowed in the wave (knip|ts-prune|vulture). max_duplication_pct: % duplicated tokens in NEW code, fail at >= this (jscpd). max_cyclomatic_complexity: no NEW function may exceed this (radon|eslint complexity). max_loc_ratio: new added LOC / plan estimate; enforced only in strict mode.
